scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev"
scripts.setup:local: npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:setup && npm run import:onlinesadar
scripts.build: npm run build -w @onlinesadar/shared && npm run build -w @onlinesadar/api && npm run build -w @onlinesadar/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @onlinesadar/web && npm run lint -w @onlinesadar/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @onlinesadar/shared && npm run typecheck -w @onlinesadar/api && npm run typecheck -w @onlinesadar/web
